remarks.text: Why We Built Lynx: Bringing Control to the Age of AI Agents
remarks.content: For a decade, one idea has guided everything we’ve built at Tigera: How do you secure a dynamic system with a lot of moving parts that is changing rapidly, with a programmatic approach? Calico has... The post Why We Built Lynx: Bringing Control to the Age of AI Agents appeared first on Tigera

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Governance as acceleration: data proves it’s not a speed bump
remarks.content: For years, the enterprise AI governance conversation has been shaped by a quiet assumption: Governance is the thing that slows AI down. This may look like the review cycle that delays the launch, committee that questions the model, or even documentation requirement that sits between a wo
remarks.contentTranslation: 多年来，企业AI治理对话一直被一个安静的假设所塑造：治理是减缓AI的因素。这可能看起来像延迟发布的审核周期、质疑模型的委员会，甚至是WO之间的文档要求
remarks.translation: 治理作为加速：数据证明它不是减速带
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Generative AI governance framework: building responsible AI systems
remarks.content: Generative AI is no longer a pilot that leaders can observe from a distance. It is in contact centers, developer workflows, reporting layers, and autonomous agents acting on behalf of the business. As BARC's research on modernizing governance for the era of agentic AI shows, the stakes r
remarks.contentTranslation: 生成式AI不再是领导者可以远距离观察的试点。它存在于联系中心、开发人员工作流、报告层和代表业务行事的自主Agent中。正如BARC关于智能AI时代治理现代化的研究所表明的那样，
remarks.translation: 生成式AI治理框架：构建负责任的AI系统

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: AI explainability in finance: auditable models, GenAI, and agents
remarks.content: Regulators are asking financial institutions a direct question: Can you explain how your AI made that decision? For most, the honest answer is no — not fully, not on demand, and not across every system that now influences regulated decisions. Compliance functions are expected to cover
remarks.contentTranslation: 监管机构正在向金融机构提出一个直接的问题：你能解释一下你的AI是如何做出这个决定的吗？对于大多数人来说，诚实的答案是否定的—不是完全的，不是按需提供的，也不是每个现在影响受监管决策的系统。合规职能预计将涵盖
remarks.translation: 财务中的AI可解释性：可审计模型、GenAI和Agent商
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text: Agentic AI tools in 2026: what to look for when choosing an enterprise-grade solution
remarks.content: Most vendors claim their agentic AI platform is enterprise-grade. In a market where the term has lost almost all meaning, the real test is not the demo. It is what happens after, when agents meet real data, real governance requirements, and the organizational complexity that no sandbox c

remarks.text:
I created a complete walkthrough of my Frontend Slides skill (22k+ stars on GitHub):
- Complete demo of how to create beautiful HTML slides with Claude Code (beginner friendly)
- How I created the skill
- How you can create your own skill
- Tips like how to insert images/videos into deck, how to publish
- Lessons I learned
(11-min video, YouTube link below)
remarks.translation: 我创建了一个完整的前端幻灯片技巧演练（ GitHub上有22000多颗星） ： -完整的演示如何使用Claude Code创建漂亮的HTML幻灯片（适合初学者） -我如何创建该技巧-如何创建自己的技能-如何将图像/视频插入到幻灯片中，如何发布-我学到的经验教训（ 11分钟视频， YouTube链接如下）

remarks.name: Swyx
remarks.role: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
remarks.text:
i dont think anyone is correctly doing the math around how SpaceX, the NeoCloud+NeoLab, is currently going to market?

SpaceX has already recouped about HALF its investment in Cursor, in compute deals. The other half is  paid for if Composer 3 does well. 

No other company is simultaneously a leading model lab + neocloud (at least where GPUs is concerned). its a crazy effective combo iff you've adequately planned out gpu supply if inhouse training 1) goes very well 2) doesn't go very well
remarks.translation:
我认为没有人正确地计算SpaceX ， NeoCloud + NeoLab ，目前如何进入市场？ SpaceX已经在计算交易中收回了对Cursor的大约一半投资。如果Composer 3表现良好，则支付另一半。没有其他公司同时是领先的模型实验室+新云（至少在GPU方面）。
这是一个疯狂有效的组合，如果你已经充分规划了gpu供应，如果内部培训1 ）进展顺利2 ）进展不顺利
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Peter Yang
remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
Ok I've fallen for the ragebaiting and have been triggered by this so I'm going to say this: 

Whether intentional or not, there's a lot of virality that comes from:

1. Pick the most ragebait moment of the conversation
2. Make a clip of that exact moment
3. Get tons of retweets and views

I can tell it's rage baiting (just like the Corgi founder clip) but here's the thing - if even one parent watches this clip and decides to neglect their kids more then the damage is done.

And yes it's hard to work at home when your kid comes back at 3 pm (or 1 pm with summer camp!) but we all make our choices.
remarks.translation:
好吧，我已经爱上了愤怒的诱惑，并且已经被触发了，所以我要说：无论是否有意，有很多病毒性来自： 1.选择谈话中最愤怒的时刻2.制作一个精确的时刻的片段3.
获得大量的转发和浏览我可以说这是愤怒的诱饵（就像柯基创始人剪辑一样） ，但事情是这样的-如果哪怕是一个家长看了这个剪辑，并决定更多地忽视他们的孩子，那么就会造成伤害。是的，当您的孩子在下午3点（或下午1点参加夏令营）回来时，在家工作很困难，但我们都会做出选择。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
Almost all AI model and agent progress is downstream from evals. Open weights post training for specific domains comes down to evals. Agent improvements in the applied AI layer is all about evals. Agentic enterprise deployments that actually can augment work is all about evals. It’s all evals.

This will become a core competency of any enterprise in the future. The companies that are able to best understand their own (and/or customers) workflows and how well agents participate in that work will be in the best position to actually drive real automation.
remarks.translation:
几乎所有AI模型和智能体进度都在EVALS的下游。特定领域的训练后开放权重归结为evals。应用的AI层中的Agent改进都与evals有关。实际上可以增强工作的Agent性企业部署都是关于EVALS的。这都是扯淡。这将成为未来任何企业的核心竞争力。
能够最好地了解自己的（和/或客户）工作流以及Agent参与该工作的程度的公司将处于实际推动真正自动化的最佳位置。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text:

remarks.contentTranslation: 中国AI实验室Z.ai于6月13日向其编码计划用户发布了GLM-5.2 ，然后于昨天（ 6月16日）在麻省理工学院许可证下发布了完整的开放权重。与他们之前的GLM尺寸相似
